title: HTML <table> should be avoided for layout purposes
description:
HTML "" should not be used for layout purposesAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityCode SmellaccessibilityreactWhy is this an issue?More InfoHTML
elements should not be used for layout purposes as it can confuse screen readers. It is recommended to use CSS instead.This rule raises an issue on every
element containing aroleattribute set to"presentation"or"none", which is howW3C recommendsmarks layout tables.Noncompliant code example
Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since10.6Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since10.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Replace table-based layout with CSS. Tables should only be used for tabular data, not layout.
Replace programmatically created layout tables with CSS-based layouts.
Replace innerHTML table layouts with CSS-based approaches.
